title: Root, Inc. (ROOT) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Root, Inc. exceeded analyst expectations in its third quarter results. The company delivered earnings per share of $1.35, significantly surpassing the consensus estimate of a loss of $0.61 per share, representing a 321.31% earnings surprise. The insurer reported quarterly revenues of $305.7 million, beating estimates by over 20%. This marks substantial growth compared to the prior year's $115.3 million in revenues. Root shares have appreciated approximately 277.6% year-to-date, substantially outpacing the S&P 500's 22.3% gain during the same period. Analysts currently hold a Hold rating on the stock. The consensus estimate for the next quarter projects a loss of $0.50 per share on $266 million in revenues. For the full fiscal year, expectations stand at a loss of $2.13 per share against $1.06 billion in revenues. The company belongs to the Insurance - Property and Casualty sector, which currently ranks in the top 38% of Zacks industries.
